NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-22-2011 Reset To Feb-22-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge: John Dearman. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: none present.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

Elizabeth Hansen for Applicant, John Patrick Smalley; via an agent under durable power of attorney, Stephen Smalley.

Ernest Der for John Patrick Smalley.

John Dooling for and with Father Charles Theodore Murr.

Helene Wenzel for and with Thomas Lucas, Conservator.

Paula Canny for Beatrice Smalley.

Respondent's Motion to Dismiss is presented and argued. Discussions regarding extending the temp for an additional time period were held.

TRO reissued and expires: February 22, 2012.

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Reset To Aug-22-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

Elizabeth Hansen for Applicant, John Patrick Smalley; via an agent under durable power of attorney, Stephen Smalley.

Devin Courteau for and with Father Charles Theodore Murr.

Helene Wenzel for and with Thomas Lucas, Conservator.

Counsel presented argument in support of their respective positions with regard to a continuance of this matter. At the conclusion of argument, the Court continued the matter to August 22, 2011, extended the temporary restraining order to the same date (order signed), and stated that if there is a further continuance request by Respondent then Respondent will be responsible for attorney fees and costs as set forth on the record. Ms. Hansen was directed to prepare the order after hearing. Ms. Hansen stated that she would submit the order after hearing to Counsel. Discussions regarding the motion determining the type of evidence that can be presented/motions in limine hearing were held.

TRO expires: August 22, 2011.

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Mar-21-2011 Reset To Apr-18-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: All causes came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

This matter was called with case number PED-10-294159 (Stephen Smalley vs. Patrick Dana).

Dept. 204. Judge: John Dearman. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Court-Appointed Counsel Ernest Der was present for John Patrick Smalley, Conservatee.

Petitioner/Requestor: Stephen Smalley, was present with Counsel, Elizabeth Hansen.

Conservator: Tom Lucas was present, with Counsel, Helene Wenzel.

Respondent: Charles Theodore Murr was present with Counsel, John Dooling.

Off the record: parties confer regarding a possible stipulation. Off the record, in-chambers discussions held.

Matter called. Ms. Hansen stated that the other side was present today, was involved in the settlement discussions, and left stating that he would be would be in contact. Ms. Hansen presented her concerns for the record. The Court continued the matter and reissued the Elder Abuse TRO to April 18, 2011. In addition, the Court directed Ms. Hansen to provide the authority regarding any request she may make to continue/reissue the TRO for a period longer than three weeks.

Reissuance expires: April 18, 2011.

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jan-26-2011 Reset To Feb-16-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: All causes came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

This matter was called with case numbers: PED-10-294159 (Stephen Smalley vs. Patrick Dana) and PCN-10-294149 (Conservatorship of John Patrick Smalley).

Court-Appointed Counsel Ernest Der appeared by telephone for John Patrick Smalley, Conservatee.
Helene Wenzel for and with Thomas Lucas, Temporary Conservator, in case number PCN-10-294149.
Elizabeth Hansen for and with Stephen Smalley, Petitioner in all three matters.
Richard Grabstein for and with Maurice Dolan, Respondent, in case number PCN-10-294149.
John Dooling for Theodore Charles Murr, Respondent in case number PED-10-294158.
Court-Appointed Counsel Grant Tomioka for Beatrice Smalley, was also present.
Patrick Smalley was also present.

Ms. Hansen stated that a reissuance was needed in case number PED-10-294159, Stephen Smalley vs. Patrick Dana, because the Respondent, Patrick Dana, had not been served. Ms. Hansen also stated that she and Mr. Dooling, Counsel for the Respondent, in case number PED-10-294158, Stephen Smalley vs. Charles Theodore Murr, had agreed to a continuance of that matter. The Court continued case numbers PED-10-294158 and PED-10-294159 to February 16, 2011 at 1:30 p.m. in Department 204 and reissued the Elder Abuse TRO's in both matters to February 16, 2011. Both reissuances expire: February 16, 2011 (orders signed).

Ms. Hansen stated that she was ready to proceed with case number PCN-10-294149. The Court hears argument by both Counsel, and after hearing the argument presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected persons: John Patrick Smalley and Beatrice Smalley. No Contact (see order for text). Order expires: 7/26/11.

Dept. 204. Judge: John Dearman. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jan-12-2011 Reset To Jan-26-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: All causes came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

This matter was called with case numbers: PED-10-294158 (Stephen Smalley vs. Charles Theodore Murr) and PED-10-294159 (Stephen Smalley vs. Patrick Dana).

Dept. 204. Judge: John Dearman. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Court-Appointed Counsel Ernest Der for John Patrick Smalley, Conservatee.

Helene Wenzel for and with Thomas Lucas, Temporary Conservator, in case number PCN-10-294149.

Elizabeth Hansen for and with Stephen Smalley, Petitioner in all three matters.

Richard Grabstein for and with Maurice Dolan, Respondent, in case number PCN-10-294149.

Theodore Charles Murr, Respondent in case number PED-10-294158, was also present.

Patrick Smalley and Christine Smalley So were also present.

Ms. Hansen stated that in the first matter that Patrick Dana had not been served and therefore a reissuance was needed, that in the second matter that Mr. Murr had filed a 170.6 challenge to Commissioner Kaplan and requested a continuance, that her client doesn't oppose Mr. Murr's request for a continuance as long as the temporary restraining order (TRO) is reissued, and that in the third matter that she and Mr. Grabstein had agreed to a continuance. Mr. Grabstein confirmed that they agreed to continue the matter.

The Court continued all three matters to January 26, 2011 and reissued all three Elder Abuse TRO's.

Reissuances expire: January 26, 2011.

Orders signed.
To Dismiss Application For Restraining Order Against Charles Therodore Murr.
